nasb.text: Then indeed, He enticed you from the mouth of distress, Instead of it, a broad place with no constraint; And that which was set on your table was full of fatness.

esv.text: He also allured you out of distress into a broad place where there was no cramping, and what was set on your table was full of fatness.

cnv.text: 他也誘導你脫離患難的虎口， 到寬闊不狹窄之地， 到你擺滿肥甘的席上。

ccb.text: 祂也要引领你脱离困境， 进入广阔自由之地， 使你享受满桌佳肴。
